name: helm

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install a chart archive into Kubernetes

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Kubernetes namespace for the release

options.name: --create-namespace
options.description: Create the release namespace if not present

options.name: --values
options.description: Specify values file(s) in YAML format

options.name: --set
options.description: Set individual values on the command line (key=value)

options.name: --set-string
options.description: Set string values on the command line (key=value)

options.name: --set-json
options.description: Set JSON values on the command line (key=jsonval)

options.name: --set-file
options.description: Set values from files on the command line (key=filepath)

options.name: --version
options.description: Specify chart version constraint

options.name: --devel
options.description: Use development versions (alpha, beta, rc) too

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Simulate an install (none|client|server)

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: --wait
options.description: Wait until all resources are in a ready state before marking the release as successful

options.name: --wait-for-jobs
options.description: Wait for all Jobs to complete before marking the release as successful

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Time to wait for any individual Kubernetes operation (default 5m0s)

options.name: --atomic
options.description: If set, installation rolls back changes on failure; implies --wait

options.name: --generate-name
options.description: Generate a release name (and omit the NAME parameter)

options.name: --name-template
options.description: Specify template used to name the release

options.name: --description
options.description: Add a custom description to the release

options.name: --dependency-update
options.description: Update dependencies before installing the chart

options.name: --disable-openapi-validation
options.description: Do not validate rendered templates against the Kubernetes OpenAPI schema

options.name: --no-hooks
options.description: Prevent hooks from running during install

options.name: --replace
options.description: Re-use the given release name even if it was previously deleted

options.name: --render-subchart-notes
options.description: Render subchart notes along with the parent

options.name: --skip-crds
options.description: Do not install CRDs in the chart

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format (table|json|yaml)

options.name: --post-renderer
options.description: Path to an executable to use for post rendering

options.name: --username
options.description: Chart repository username

options.name: --password
options.description: Chart repository password

options.name: --ca-file
options.description: Verify certificates against this CA bundle

options.name: --cert-file
options.description: Identify HTTPS client using this SSL certificate file

options.name: --key-file
options.description: Identify HTTPS client using this SSL key file

options.name: --insecure-skip-tls-verify
options.description: Skip TLS certificate checks for the chart download

options.name: --plain-http
options.description: Use insecure HTTP connections for the chart download

options.name: --verify
options.description: Verify the package before using it

options.name: --keyring
options.description: Location of public keys used for verification

subcommands.name: upgrade
subcommands.description: Upgrade a release to a new version of a chart

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Kubernetes namespace of the release

options.name: --install
options.description: If a release by this name doesn't exist, install it

options.name: --values
options.description: Specify values file(s) in YAML format

options.name: --set
options.description: Set individual values on the command line (key=value)

options.name: --set-string
options.description: Set string values on the command line (key=value)

options.name: --set-json
options.description: Set JSON values on the command line (key=jsonval)

options.name: --set-file
options.description: Set values from files on the command line (key=filepath)

options.name: --version
options.description: Specify chart version constraint

options.name: --devel
options.description: Use development versions (alpha, beta, rc) too

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Simulate an upgrade (none|client|server)

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: --wait
options.description: Wait until all resources are in a ready state

options.name: --wait-for-jobs
options.description: Wait for all Jobs to complete

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Time to wait for any individual Kubernetes operation (default 5m0s)

options.name: --atomic
options.description: If set, upgrade rolls back changes on failure; implies --wait

options.name: --force
options.description: Force resource updates through a replacement strategy

options.name: --reset-values
options.description: When upgrading, reset the values to the ones built into the chart

options.name: --reuse-values
options.description: When upgrading, reuse the last release's values and merge in any overrides

options.name: --reset-then-reuse-values
options.description: When upgrading, reset the values to the chart's defaults, then merge reused values

options.name: --create-namespace
options.description: Create the release namespace if not present (--install only)

options.name: --cleanup-on-fail
options.description: Delete newly created resources on a failed upgrade

options.name: --history-max
options.description: Limit the maximum number of revisions saved per release (0 for no limit)

options.name: --no-hooks
options.description: Prevent hooks from running during upgrade

options.name: --render-subchart-notes
options.description: Render subchart notes along with the parent

options.name: --skip-crds
options.description: Do not install CRDs if they are not already present

options.name: --disable-openapi-validation
options.description: Do not validate rendered templates against the Kubernetes OpenAPI schema

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format (table|json|yaml)

options.name: --post-renderer
options.description: Path to an executable to use for post rendering

subcommands.name: uninstall
subcommands.description: Uninstall a release from Kubernetes

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Kubernetes namespace of the release

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Simulate an uninstall

options.name: --keep-history
options.description: Remove all associated resources and mark the release as deleted, but retain release history

options.name: --no-hooks
options.description: Prevent hooks from running during uninstallation

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Time to wait for any individual Kubernetes operation (default 5m0s)

options.name: --wait
options.description: Wait for deletion of all associated resources

options.name: --cascade
options.description: Cascade strategy (background|orphan|foreground)

options.name: --description
options.description: Add a custom description to the release

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List releases across namespaces

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Kubernetes namespace to list releases from

options.name: --all-namespaces
options.description: List releases across all namespaces

options.name: --all
options.description: Show all releases without any filter applied

options.name: --deployed
options.description: Show deployed releases (default if none specified)

options.name: --failed
options.description: Show failed releases

options.name: --pending
options.description: Show pending releases

options.name: --superseded
options.description: Show superseded releases

options.name: --uninstalled
options.description: Show uninstalled releases (if --keep-history was used)

options.name: --uninstalling
options.description: Show releases that are currently being uninstalled

options.name: --date
options.description: Sort by release date

options.name: --reverse
options.description: Reverse the sort order

options.name: --max
options.description: Maximum number of releases to fetch (default 256)

options.name: --offset
options.description: Next release index in the list (used for pagination)

options.name: --filter
options.description: A regular expression to filter release names

options.name: --selector
options.description: Label selector to filter on (CURRENTLY NOT IMPLEMENTED)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format (table|json|yaml)

options.name: --no-headers
options.description: Do not print column headers with default output format

options.name: --time-format
options.description: Format time using golang time format

options.name: --short
options.description: Print output in short (quiet) format

subcommands.name: repo add
subcommands.description: Add a chart repository

options.name: --force-update
options.description: Replace (overwrite) the repo even if it already exists

options.name: --allow-deprecated-repos
options.description: Allow adding repositories previously marked as deprecated

options.name: --username
options.description: Chart repository username

options.name: --password
options.description: Chart repository password

options.name: --pass-credentials
options.description: Pass credentials to all domains

options.name: --no-update
options.description: Do not update if a repo with the same name already exists

options.name: --ca-file
options.description: Verify certificates against this CA bundle

options.name: --cert-file
options.description: Identify HTTPS client using this SSL certificate file

options.name: --key-file
options.description: Identify HTTPS client using this SSL key file

options.name: --insecure-skip-tls-verify
options.description: Skip TLS certificate verification

examples: helm repo add myrepo https://charts.example.com --username admin --password secret
helm repo add myrepo https://charts.example.com --ca-file ca.pem

subcommands.name: repo remove
subcommands.description: Remove one or more chart repositories

subcommands.name: repo update
subcommands.description: Update information of available charts locally from chart repositories

args.name: <name>...
args.description: Specific repo name(s) to update (default: all)

options.name: --fail-on-repo-update-fail
options.description: Return an error if any repo update fails

subcommands.name: repo list

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format (table|json|yaml)

options.name: --no-headers
options.description: Do not print column headers

subcommands.name: repo index

options.name: --url
options.description: URL of chart repository

options.name: --merge
options.description: Merge the generated index into the given index

options.name: --max-col-width
options.description: Maximum column width for output table

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format (table|json|yaml)

options.name: --list-repo-url
options.description: Print charts repository URL

options.name: --fail-on-no-result
options.description: Return an error if no results are found

subcommands.name: search repo

options.name: --devel
options.description: Use development versions (alpha, beta, rc) too

options.name: --max-col-width

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format (table|json|yaml)

options.name: --regexp
options.description: Use regular expressions for searching

options.name: --version
options.description: Search for a specific chart version / version constraint

options.name: --versions
options.description: Show all available versions, not just the latest

options.name: --fail-on-no-result
options.description: Return an error if no results are found

options.description: Location to write the chart (default '.')

options.name: --devel
options.description: Use development versions too

options.name: --repo
options.description: Chart repository URL

options.name: --username
options.description: Chart repository username

options.name: --ca-file

options.name: --cert-file

options.description: Skip TLS certificate verification

options.description: Use insecure HTTP connections

options.name: --prov
options.description: Fetch the provenance file, but don't perform verification

options.name: --verify
options.description: Verify the package before using it

options.name: --keyring
options.description: Location of public keys used for verification

options.name: --pass-credentials

options.name: --sign
options.description: Use a PGP private key to sign this package

options.name: --key

options.name: --passphrase-file

subcommands.name: template
subcommands.description: Locally render templates without connecting to the server

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Namespace for the release

options.name: --values
options.description: Specify values file(s) in YAML format

options.name: --set
options.description: Set individual values on the command line (key=value)

options.name: --set-string
options.description: Set string values on the command line (key=value)

options.name: --set-json
options.description: Set JSON values on the command line (key=jsonval)

options.name: --set-file
options.description: Set values from files on the command line (key=filepath)

options.name: --version
options.description: Specify chart version constraint

options.name: --show-only
options.description: Only show manifests rendered from the given templates

options.name: --output-dir
options.description: Write rendered manifests to this directory instead of stdout

options.name: --release-name
options.description: Use release name in the output-dir path

options.name: --validate
options.description: Validate rendered templates against the Kubernetes cluster

options.name: --include-crds
options.description: Include CRDs in the templated output

options.name: --skip-crds
options.description: Do not include CRDs in the templated output

options.name: --no-hooks
options.description: Do not render hook templates

options.name: --is-upgrade
options.description: Set .Release.IsUpgrade instead of .Release.IsInstall

options.name: --dependency-update
options.description: Update dependencies before rendering

options.name: --api-versions
options.description: Kubernetes API versions used for Capabilities.APIVersions

options.name: --kube-version
options.description: Kubernetes version used for Capabilities.KubeVersion

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: --disable-openapi-validation
options.description: Do not validate rendered templates against the Kubernetes OpenAPI schema

options.name: --post-renderer
options.description: Path to an executable to use for post rendering

options.name: --values
options.description: Specify values file(s) in YAML format

options.name: --set
options.description: Set individual values on the command line (key=value)

options.name: --set-string
options.description: Set string values on the command line (key=value)

options.name: --set-json
options.description: Set JSON values on the command line (key=jsonval)

options.name: --set-file
options.description: Set values from files on the command line (key=filepath)

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Namespace for template rendering

options.name: --strict
options.description: Fail on lint warnings

options.name: --with-subcharts

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Print only warnings and errors

subcommands.name: test

options.description: Kubernetes namespace of the release

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Time to wait for any individual Kubernetes operation (default 5m0s)

options.name: --logs
options.description: Dump the logs from test pods

subcommands.name: rollback
subcommands.description: Roll back a release to a previous revision

args.name: <revision>
args.description: Revision number to roll back to (default: previous)

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Kubernetes namespace of the release

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Simulate a rollback

options.name: --force
options.description: Force resource update through delete/recreate if needed

options.name: --no-hooks
options.description: Prevent hooks from running during rollback

options.name: --recreate-pods
options.description: Perform pods restart for the resource (DEPRECATED)

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Time to wait for any individual Kubernetes operation (default 5m0s)

options.name: --wait
options.description: Wait until all Pods, PVCs, Services, Deployments, StatefulSets, or ReplicaSets are in a ready state

options.name: --wait-for-jobs
options.description: Wait for all Jobs to complete

options.name: --cleanup-on-fail
options.description: Delete newly created resources on a failed rollback

options.name: --history-max
options.description: Limit the maximum number of revisions saved per release

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Kubernetes namespace of the release

options.name: --max
options.description: Maximum number of revisions to include in history

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format (table|json|yaml)

subcommands.name: registry login
subcommands.description: Authenticate to an OCI registry

options.name: --username
options.description: Registry username

options.name: --password
options.description: Registry password or identity token

options.name: --password-stdin
options.description: Read password from stdin

options.name: --ca-file
options.description: Verify certificates against this CA bundle

options.name: --cert-file
options.description: Identify HTTPS client using this SSL certificate file

options.name: --key-file
options.description: Identify HTTPS client using this SSL key file

options.name: --insecure
options.description: Allow connections to TLS registry without certs

examples: helm registry login registry.example.com -u admin -p secret

subcommands.name: registry logout
subcommands.description: Remove credentials stored for a remote registry

globalOptions.name: --kube-apiserver
globalOptions.description: The address and port of the Kubernetes API server

globalOptions.name: --kube-as-group
globalOptions.description: Group to impersonate for the operation (repeatable)

globalOptions.name: --kube-as-user
globalOptions.description: Username to impersonate for the operation

globalOptions.name: --kube-ca-file
globalOptions.description: The certificate authority file for the Kubernetes API server connection

globalOptions.name: --kube-context
globalOptions.description: Name of the kubeconfig context to use

globalOptions.name: --kube-insecure-skip-tls-verify
globalOptions.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for Kubernetes API server

globalOptions.name: --kube-tls-server-name
globalOptions.description: Server name to use for Kubernetes API server TLS certificate validation

globalOptions.name: --registry-config
globalOptions.description: Path to the registry config file

globalOptions.name: --repository-cache
globalOptions.description: Path to the directory containing cached repository indexes

globalOptions.name: --repository-config
globalOptions.description: Path to the file containing repository names and URLs

globalOptions.name: --qps
globalOptions.description: Queries per second used when communicating with the Kubernetes API

examples: helm repo add bitnami https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami && helm repo update
helm package ./my-chart && helm push my-chart-0.1.0.tgz oci://registry.example.com/charts
helm diff upgrade my-release bitnami/nginx -f values.yaml

detectors.name: releases
detectors.description: All deployed Helm releases across all namespaces

detectors.name: release_details
detectors.description: Detailed Helm release information with status, chart, app version, and namespace in JSON format

detectors.name: release_details_all
detectors.description: Detailed Helm release information across all namespaces in JSON format

detectors.name: failed_releases
detectors.description: Helm releases in a failed state across all namespaces

detectors.name: pending_releases
detectors.description: Helm releases in a pending state across all namespaces

detectors.name: repos
detectors.description: Configured Helm chart repositories with names and URLs

detectors.name: repos_json
detectors.description: Configured Helm chart repositories in JSON format

detectors.name: plugins
detectors.description: Installed Helm plugins with name and version

detectors.name: env_vars
detectors.description: Helm client environment variables (data home, config home, cache, plugins, registry, repository paths)

detectors.name: kube_context
detectors.description: Current active Kubernetes context used by Helm

detectors.name: namespaces
detectors.description: All Kubernetes namespaces available for Helm releases

detectors.name: chart_dependencies
detectors.description: Dependencies of the Helm chart in the current directory

detectors.name: release_history
detectors.description: Revision history for all releases in the current namespace

detectors.name: oci_registries
detectors.command: helm registry list 2>/dev/null || echo 'no registries configured'
